recommendationReason: 1 of the required >=3 conclusive P-JUDGE runs is on record for this exact identity; 2 more are owed. CommonStack is intermittently throttled (429), so the 3x run could not be completed this sprint. No ApprovalRecord added; the production approved registry stays empty and url-verifiable autopay safely holds for manual review.

lastConclusiveRun.note: overnight sprint run on this exact committed identity (strict parse + explicit normal-termination); zero wrong-autopay.

attemptsThisSprint.note: 429 on the first request; resumable runner stopped honestly (not promotion evidence).

pEntail.rootCause: The old harness ADAPTED the payout judge fixtures: it gave only criterion 0 a blind 60-char evidence slice as its quote and left every other criterion's quote null, producing malformed multi-criterion inputs the checker could not verify. Every haiku output then failed the strict per-criterion validation (invalid_output), so the 0/15 was a HARNESS defect, not a model-quality result.
pEntail.fix: A dedicated entailment corpus (src/lib/deputy/entailment-fixtures.ts): 13 single-criterion fixtures, each a verbatim quote of its bounded evidence, tagged by trap category (direct/partial/wrong-criterion/generic/negation/numeric/actor/temporal/stale/adjacent/multilingual x2/injection), each with the verdict a correct checker must return. The live harness now uses it. A deterministic test (entailment-corpus.test.ts, 21 cases) proves the corpus is well-formed and the veto vetoes every non-entailing trap + fails closed on malformed/abnormal output.
pEntail.liveBlocker: CommonStack quota throttled (429). A live P-ENTAIL over the dedicated corpus is owed when quota is unthrottled; promotion targets: zero false 'entailed' on non-entailing fixtures, zero malformed accepted, the quote-non-entailing trap vetoed every run.

flags.note: Nothing here approves the identity. Approval remains a later, explicit founder/registry decision after a clean >=3x conclusive run.
